_comment: IUCN Red List status keyed by scientific name (lowercased). Seeded from the public IUCN Red List website (https://www.iucnredlist.org/) and refreshable via scripts/fetch-iucn-status.mjs when IUCN_API_KEY is set. Categories: EX, EW, CR (Critically Endangered), EN (Endangered), VU (Vulnerable), NT (Near Threatened), LC (Least Concern), DD (Data Deficient), NE (Not Evaluated).
